case_title: T&S REALTY et al VS. FRISCO BENTON et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF T&S REALTY CAL AMERCIAN COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-18-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

SETTLEMENT TERMS ARE PUT ON THE RECORD: IT'S BINDING AGREEMENT. DEFTS ARE TO VACA THE PREMISES AT 615 JOHN MUIR DR. #D316, SF., CA BY 10-1-03. DEFTS ARE TO KEEP THE PREMISES BROOM-CLEAN AND RETURN THE KEY TO PLTF. DEFTS ARE TO PAY $1,150 BY 8-27-03, $1,150 BY 8-31-03 AND $1,150 BY 9-5-03. IF VACATED, DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WILL BE FILED. LEASE IS FORFEITED. SECURITY DEPOSIT IS TO BE RETURNED. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE THE PREMISES, PLTF WILL HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED BY EX PARTE GIVING 24-HOUR NOTICE BY CALLING 650-245-2412 AND ALSO RALPH HARRISON, ESQ. AT 213-739-1777 AND FILING DECLARATION. PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE IN CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER. THE PARTIES PERSONALLY AGREE TO THE TERMS. JUDGE, JOHN E. MUNTER;REPORTER, RHONDA AQUILINA;CLERK, T.MARUYAMA (DEPT. 505)
CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT BENTON, FRISCO WEBB, BRIDGETTE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT T&S REALTY CAL AMERCIAN ROES1-50

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF T&S REALTY CAL AMERCIAN AS TO DEFENDANT BENTON, FRISCO WEBB, BRIDGETTE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BENTON, FRISCO WEBB, BRIDGETTE
MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE; P&A IN SUPPORT FILED BY DEFENDANT BENTON, FRISCO WEBB, BRIDGETTE
MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-18-2003 AT 10:45 AM IN DEPT. 505, JOHN E. MUNTER. CASE SETTLED, SENT TO PLACE THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD.
MINUTES FOR AUG-18-2003 10:45 AM FOR DEPT 505
